name: Merge Monster Battles
author: Poki
description: Merge Monster Battles is a merge game where you hatch cute eggs, merge them into powerful monsters, and send them into battle! Watch your monsters fight waves of enemies, earn money from every victory, and use it to buy even more eggs. Keep merging to unlock stronger and stronger creatures, and build the ultimate monster squad. Ready to merge, fight, and win? How to play Merge Monster Battles? Click or hold to merge. Who created Merge Monster Battles? Merge Monster Battles is created by Entrevero Games. They have other amazing games on Poki: Vero Life - Dress Up & Decor , Kawaii Dress-Up , Fairy Dress-Up , Dungeons & Dress-Ups , Bearsus , Cozy Room Design , Full Metal Football , Blobby Slime Quest , Cozy Garden Design , CombiMon , and Stick Fighter ! How can I play Merge Monster Battles for free? You can play Merge Monster Battles for free on Poki. Can I play Merge Monster Battles on mobile devices and desktop? Merge Monster Battles can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
